_note: HDB Central Area carparks that received the post-2022 peak-period rate restructuring. These get explicit time-banded MANUAL rate_rows from this file and have the daily $20 cap DISABLED (per HDB).
_source: Curate from the HDB press-release annex announcing the restructured tier (Sep 2022 onward). The annex lists specific carpark codes and the peak rate per band (typically a higher $/30min during 07:00–22:30 weekdays).
